advancements.takeshow.root.title: Did you hear that?
advancements.takeshow.ping.title: Ping!
advancements.takeshow.ping.description: Right-click the Echo Charm once. Totally scientific.
advancements.takeshow.no_hiding.title: No Stealth (Even If You Weren't)
advancements.takeshow.resonant_pickaxe.d: Obtain a Resonant Pickaxe. Yes, it rings. No, you can't turn it off.
advancements.takeshow.first_pulse.title: First Ping
advancements.takeshow.first_pulse.descri: Mine your first block with the Resonant Pickaxe. The underground replies.
